test_manifest_entry.source_file: string — absolute path to the source file under test
test_manifest_entry.test_command: string — shell command to run the covering test
test_manifest_entry.env: object|null — env vars required to run the test
test_manifest_entry.last_run_at: string|null — ISO 8601 timestamp of last test run

change_log_entry.files_touched: array of strings — absolute paths modified
change_log_entry.test_evidence: string|null — path to test-results.jsonl entry or null
change_log_entry.description: string — human-readable summary of the change
change_log_entry.merged_at: string|null — ISO 8601 timestamp when merged, null if pending
change_log_entry.worktree: string — path to the git worktree used for this change
